announcement.goals.stupid_express.thief: Steal weapons and be the last one standing!
game.win.stupid_express.thief: Even if you know me,you can do nothing against my weapon
guidebook.role.description.stupid_expres:
A neutral killer whose goal is to be the last one standing. Steal to survive. With an empty hand, press your §eUse Item key§r (default RMB) on players to steal a random item from their inventory. Each successful steal triggers a §e1 minute and 30 second cooldown§r. If there are no items to steal, the attempt goes on cooldown for half that time.

Steal a §eRevolver§r, §eKnife§r, or §eGrenade§r to gain the power to execute others.

Instinct highlights both players and items, potentially marking important items. So choose wisely. Empty pockets leave you vulnerable.
game.win.stupid_express.lovers: When we unite by love,our world's fate is sealed
hud.stupid_express.lovers.notification: You are in love with someone on the train!

replay.death.stupid_express.dual_active_: %s died as the double-active moment ended
announcement.goals.stupid_express.initia: Eliminate the other initiate in order to become a killer!
stupid_express.config.rolesSection.initi: This decides what role the Initiate will fallback to if the other Initiate dies to anything but an Initiate.
stupid_express.config.modifiersSection.l: If true, the Lovers get a preview of their lover's skin and name on their indicator.
If one of the Lovers is a killer and this is true, the lovers win alongside killers.
If both of the Lovers is a civilian and this is true, the lovers win alongside civilians. Otherwise, they will need to be eliminated for the game to end.
Lovers can see the other lover glow.
stupid_express.config.modifiersSection.d: If true and one personality is a killer, dual personality players may win alongside killers.
If true, dual personality players may win alongside passengers when no other independent win faction remains.
Dual Personality enters the random modifier pool only at or above this player count.
